'''Kibo Sands''' was a desert on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. [[Skot OnSon]] and his family lived on a farm nearby and lost it when the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]] cut off the water supply.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
